Home / Services / Wood Fences

Wood Fences

Classic style and privacy for Long Beach homes.

Wood fences offer a timeless aesthetic and provide excellent privacy for Long Beach homes. From traditional picket fences to solid privacy fences, Go Iron Works Inc. offers a wide range of wood fencing options to suit your style and budget. We understand the importance of using high-quality materials that can withstand the Southern California climate, including the intense sun and occasional Santa Ana winds.

We use pressure-treated lumber that is resistant to rot and decay, ensuring your fence will last for years to come. We also offer a variety of staining and painting options to protect your fence from the elements and enhance its beauty. Our experienced team will handle all aspects of the installation process, from site preparation to final cleanup, ensuring a professional and long-lasting fence.

Whether you're looking to add curb appeal to your home, create a private backyard oasis, or simply define your property lines, a wood fence from Go Iron Works Inc. is a great investment. We're committed to providing our customers with the highest quality wood fences at competitive prices. Enhance your property with a beautiful and functional wood fence from Go Iron Works Inc.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design Consultation: We discuss your style preferences, privacy needs, and budget to create a custom wood fence design.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection: We help you choose the right type of wood, stain, and hardware for your specific needs.
  3. 03 Step 3: Installation: Our experienced team installs your fence with precision and care, ensuring a secure and long-lasting installation.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing: We apply a stain or paint to protect your fence from the elements and enhance its beauty.

Benefits

  • Enhanced Privacy
  • Classic Aesthetic
  • Affordable Option
  • Customizable Designs

Frequently Asked Questions

How often do I need to stain or paint my wood fence?

It's recommended to stain or paint your wood fence every 2-3 years to protect it from the elements.

What type of wood is best for fences in Long Beach?

Pressure-treated redwood or cedar are excellent choices for wood fences in Long Beach due to their natural resistance to rot and decay.

Can you match the stain color of my existing fence?

Yes, we can match the stain color of your existing fence to ensure a seamless look.
